title: Digital Clock
shortDescription: A live digital clock with 12/24-hour display.
seoDescription: Free online digital clock — see the current time in 12-hour or 24-hour format, updated live in your browser.

title: BMI Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate your Body Mass Index from height and weight.

title: Loan Calculator
shortDescription: Estimate monthly payments and total interest on a loan.

title: JSON Formatter
